rows.name: prompt
rows.description: The input text prompt for the model to generate a response.

rows.name: model
rows.description: ID of the model to use (e.g. '@cf/zai-org/glm-4.7-flash, etc').

rows.name: audio
rows.description: Parameters for audio output. Required when modalities includes 'audio'.

rows.name: frequency_penalty
rows.description: Penalizes new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far.

rows.name: logit_bias
rows.description: Modify the likelihood of specified tokens appearing in the completion. Maps token IDs to bias values from -100 to 100.

rows.name: logprobs
rows.description: Whether to return log probabilities of the output tokens.

rows.name: top_logprobs
rows.description: How many top log probabilities to return at each token position (0-20). Requires logprobs=true.

rows.name: max_tokens
rows.description: Deprecated in favor of max_completion_tokens. The maximum number of tokens to generate.

rows.name: max_completion_tokens
rows.description: An upper bound for the number of tokens that can be generated for a completion.

rows.name: metadata
rows.description: Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to the object.

rows.name: modalities
rows.description: Output types requested from the model (e.g. ['text'] or ['text', 'audio']).

rows.name: n
rows.description: How many chat completion choices to generate for each input message.

rows.name: parallel_tool_calls
rows.description: Whether to enable parallel function calling during tool use.

rows.name: presence_penalty
rows.description: Penalizes new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far.

rows.name: reasoning_effort
rows.description: Constrains effort on reasoning for reasoning models (o1, o3-mini, etc.).

children.name: enable_thinking
children.description: Whether to enable reasoning, enabled by default.

children.name: clear_thinking
children.description: If false, preserves reasoning context between turns.

rows.name: response_format
rows.description: Specifies the format the model must output.

rows.name: seed
rows.description: If specified, the system will make a best effort to sample deterministically.

rows.name: service_tier
rows.description: Specifies the processing type used for serving the request.

children.name: Option 1
children.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

children.name: Option 2
children.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

children.name: Option 3
children.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

rows.name: store
rows.description: Whether to store the output for model distillation / evals.

rows.name: stream
rows.description: If true, partial message deltas will be sent as server-sent events.

rows.name: temperature
rows.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2.

rows.name: tool_choice
rows.description: Controls which (if any) tool is called by the model. 'none' = no tools, 'auto' = model decides, 'required' = must call a tool.

children.name: Option 2
children.description: Force a specific function tool.

children.name: Option 3
children.description: Force a specific custom tool.

children.name: Option 4
children.description: Constrain to an allowed subset of tools.

rows.name: tools
rows.description: A list of tools the model may call.

children.name: name
children.description: The name of the function to be called.

children.name: description
children.description: A description of what the function does.

children.name: parameters
children.description: The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON Schema object.

children.name: strict
children.description: Whether to enable strict schema adherence.

rows.name: top_p
rows.description: Nucleus sampling: considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass.

rows.name: user
rows.description: A unique identifier representing your end-user, for abuse monitoring.

rows.name: web_search_options
rows.description: Options for the web search tool (when using built-in web search).

children.name: name
children.description: The name of the function to be called.

children.name: description
children.description: A description of what the function does.

children.name: parameters
children.description: The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON Schema object.

children.name: strict
children.description: Whether to enable strict schema adherence.

rows.name: id
rows.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion.

rows.name: created
rows.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) of when the completion was created.

rows.name: model
rows.description: The model used for the chat completion.

children.name: data
children.description: Base64 encoded audio bytes.

children.name: arguments
children.description: JSON-encoded arguments string.
